CustomField.description: Apex class that provides context variables (e.g. newRecord, oldRecord) for entry criteria formula evaluation. Built-in contexts exist for standard objects (Account, Contact, Lead, Opportunity, Case, Campaign, Task, Event, User) and Foobar__c — leave blank for those. Custom objects require a class implementing the formula context interface.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Leave blank for standard objects and Foobar — built-in contexts are auto-detected. For custom objects, enter the class that provides formula variables (newRecord, oldRecord).
CustomField.label: Context Class Name
